tests.name: pay site public config present
tests.why_it_matters: The extension must point at the California primary HWH APIs.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep this file public-only and rerun security scan before any upload.

tests.name: email OTP UI present
tests.why_it_matters: The commercial plugin must let users log in through the HWH email OTP flow.
tests.recommended_next_action: Use real plugin smoke to verify SEND_OTP and VERIFY_OTP before launch.

tests.name: background message contract present
tests.why_it_matters: The extension-side protocol must match the verified HWH handoff.
tests.recommended_next_action: Do not add service-role or Waffo private keys to this client contract.

tests.name: checkout source is chrome_extension
tests.why_it_matters: The HWH payment trace must distinguish plugin checkouts from web checkouts.
tests.recommended_next_action: Confirm the backend still receives source=chrome_extension in real plugin smoke.

tests.name: successUrl does not unlock locally
tests.why_it_matters: Paid access must come only from webhook-derived entitlement.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the success page as informational only.

tests.name: CONSUME_USAGE gate exists before fill
tests.why_it_matters: Free quota and Pro unlimited behavior must be enforced before the core fill action runs.
tests.recommended_next_action: Run the 10 free fills plus 11th quota exceeded smoke before publish.

tests.name: REFRESH_ENTITLEMENT active path exists
tests.why_it_matters: Users must refresh membership after payment rather than relying on successUrl.
tests.recommended_next_action: Verify active, free, invalid, expired, and revoked states in plugin smoke.

tests.name: auth tokens stay in background path
tests.why_it_matters: Content scripts and visible UI must not persist raw session tokens.
tests.recommended_next_action: Inspect storage during smoke and verify content script has no token.

tests.name: free usage counter visible
tests.why_it_matters: Free users must see the remaining fill allowance before hitting the paywall.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the 10-fill copy and remaining counter visible in the popup.

tests.name: quota exceeded path present
tests.why_it_matters: The 11th free fill must stop with a quota error instead of silently allowing more usage.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep the quota-exceeded path covered in plugin smoke before upload.

tests.name: test mode checkout guard
tests.why_it_matters: This candidate must not imply production payment is enabled.
tests.recommended_next_action: Keep production payment disabled until explicit approval and live payment verification.

tests.name: public-only payment config
tests.why_it_matters: The extension may ship public Supabase config only, never payment or service-role secrets.
tests.recommended_next_action: Run monetization:security-scan before any upload decision.
